## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing behavior it affects.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI polish
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/release

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Not applicable

## YouTube chat surfaces touched

- [ ] Message rendering / translation
- [ ] Message action menu
- [ ] Chat settings menu
- [ ] Chat input / commands
- [ ] Emoji picker
- [ ] Avatar/profile card
- [ ] Inbox / keyword highlights
- [ ] Inbox sound / tab alert
- [ ] Keep chat live
- [ ] Extension popup
- [ ] Docs/assets only
- [ ] Other:

## Privacy and data

- [ ] No new data is stored or sent.
- [ ] This changes local storage behavior.
- [ ] This changes synced settings behavior.
- [ ] This changes network behavior.
- [ ] Privacy documentation was updated if needed.

## Notes

Mention any YouTube DOM assumptions, browser-specific behavior, screenshots, migration/reset expectations, or release notes needed for reviewers.
